name: firebase_get_sdk_config
description: Use this to retrieve the Firebase configuration information for a Firebase App. You must specify EITHER a platform OR the Firebase App ID for a Firebase App registered in the currently active Firebase Project.

app_id.description: The specific app ID to fetch. One of 'platform' or 'app_id' must be provided.

platform.description: The platform for which you want config. One of 'platform' or 'app_id' must be provided.
